weekOf: March 5th to March 12th (Not live until ~5am EDT on March 5th)
introMessages: Wrap the Pfister X-treme in the new Premier Half Camo livery, now available from all Vehicle Workshops in GTA Online.

Take advantage of doubled Salvaging Speed to break down neglected vehicles and earn 2X Daily Income and Scrap Value at your Salvage Yard. Complete The Podium Robbery and The Gangbanger Robbery for the chance to claim two Personal Vehicles.
And brace yourself for a new event starting next week celebrating the very best Jobs in the Community Series and the Creators who make them.
prizeRideChallenge: Place Top 5 in the LS Car Meet Series 3 days in a row
premiumRace: Crossing Paths, locked to Sports Classic
weeklyChallenge: Complete two Salvage Yard Robberies to receive GTA$100,000
bonuses: 2X GTA$ and RP - Community Race Series (4X for GTA+ Members)
2X GTA$ - Salvage Yard Daily Income (4X for GTA+ Members)
2X GTA$ - Tow Truck Service Salvage Value
2X GTA$ - Salvage Yard Vehicle Salvaging Speed
discounts: 40% Off: Salvage Yard Upgrades and Modifications
